projects.title: Projects
projects.developmentDescription: A collection of software development projects showcasing technical expertise in web development, application design, and system architecture. These projects demonstrate hands-on coding skills and implementation of modern technologies.
projects.generalDescription: A portfolio of project management initiatives spanning various domains including system implementations, process improvements, and organizational transformations. These projects highlight leadership, strategic planning, and successful delivery of complex solutions.

developmentProjects.title: DLR Digital Tap Prototype
developmentProjects.description: A digital tap in / tap out for use on the DLR train line.

developmentProjects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
developmentProjects.description: A fully responsive personal portfolio site with modern design and seamless user experience

developmentProjects.title: Task Management Web App
developmentProjects.description: A feature-rich task management application with drag-and-drop functionality and team collaboration tools.

generalProjects.title: Workday Implementation
generalProjects.description: Implemented Workday platform for human capital management, finance, and core processes, streamlining operations across the organization.

generalProjects.title: Cornerstone Implementation
generalProjects.description: Led deployment of Cornerstone, a cloud-based learning and talent management platform, focusing on learning management, performance reviews, and recruitment.

generalProjects.title: CRM Implementation
generalProjects.description: Integrated a Customer Relationship Management system, streamlining sales, marketing, and customer service operations.

generalProjects.title: Audio2Face (Phase 1 and 2)
generalProjects.description: Phase 1: Initial rollout of AI-driven tool for animating facial movements from voice data. Phase 2: Enhancements including batch processing, multiple characters and shots, viewable generation, and code reuse.

generalProjects.title: Travel Management System
generalProjects.description: Implemented a system for organizing and tracking business-related travel, improving efficiency and cost management.

generalProjects.title: Survey Tool
generalProjects.description: Deployed a survey tool for collecting feedback and data from users, enhancing decision-making and customer satisfaction.

generalProjects.title: Confluence Upgrade
generalProjects.description: Led an upgrade of the Confluence collaboration tool, improving internal documentation and knowledge sharing capabilities.

generalProjects.title: Recruitment Features & Upgrades
generalProjects.description: Added new features to the recruitment platform, streamlining the hiring process and upgrading the system for better functionality.

generalProjects.title: Talent Management
generalProjects.description: Involved in talent management initiatives, integrating systems for performance reviews, employee development, and succession planning.

generalProjects.title: Jira Triage Improvements
generalProjects.description: Enhanced the Jira ticket triage process, improving workflow efficiency, prioritization, and task management for the team.
